curation.synopsis: The second Warhammer Horror anthology gathers twelve short tales from ten authors, set across both the 41st millennium and the Mortal Realms. An Imperial priest extracts a monstrous confession; a widower embarks on a doomed pilgrimage; a witch hunter returns to a place of nightmares. From abandoned medicae facilities and frostbitten Imperial outposts to ghostly castle dungeons in the realms of Sigmar, the contributors — David Annandale, Lora Gray, Steven Sheil, Richard Strachan, Jake Ozga, C L Werner, Ray Cluley, Justin D Hill, Nick Kyme, and Peter McLean — reach for everything from creeping cosmic horror to outright body horror.

flags.suggestion: multi-author (Annandale, Gray, Sheil, Strachan, Ozga, Werner, Cluley, Hill, Kyme, McLean)
